name: Employee HR Data Processing
purpose: Personnel management, HR records, payroll calculation
article_reference: Labor Code of the Russian Federation Art. 86
notes: Mandatory processing to comply with labor legislation requirements

name: User Registration and Authentication
purpose: Providing access to the service, managing user accounts

name: Marketing Emails and Push Notifications
purpose: Informing about new products, promotions, and special offers
notes: Requires explicit consent of the data subject. Unsubscribe option is provided in each email.

name: User Behavior Analytics
purpose: Improving user experience, evaluating interface effectiveness
notes: Pseudonymization is applied. IP addresses are truncated to /24 before storage.

name: Payment Data Processing
purpose: Processing payment transactions, complying with PCI DSS requirements
notes: Only payment provider tokens are stored. Full card details are not stored (PCI DSS scope).
